title: Enterprise AI agents are doing real work now. They authenticate ...
full_text:
Enterprise AI agents are doing real work now. 💪
They authenticate customers, follow policies, complete workflows, update systems, and hand off complex issues to frontline teams. So the question is no longer, “Can the agent hold a conversation?” It is, “How do we know it is ready for production, and how do we keep improving it once it is live?”
That is where Proactive Quality and Agent Harness come together.
Proactive Quality turns real production conversations into reusable simulations and evaluations. Agent Harness gives teams the safe workspaces, versioning, governance, and rollout controls to act on what they learn. Together, they create a continuous loop:
Test the agent. Measure performance. Improve the workflow. Govern the release. Learn from production. Repeat.
That is how enterprises move faster without losing control. Every conversation becomes a learning opportunity. Every release becomes measurable. Every improvement is backed by evidence.
Read more about our Proactive Quality here 👉️ https://www.observe.ai/blog/introducing-proactive-quality-for-ai-agents?utm_source=organic-social&utm_medium=facebook&utm_campaign=Agent-Harness-Blog | Observe.AI
